title: A Day in the Sun
content: The sun is up. I get out of bed. I take off my night dress. I have a bath with warm water and soap. I put on clean clothes: a white shirt, grey trousers, brown shoes. I take a comb and make my hair smooth. Then I go to the table. I get a cup of milk, an egg, bread with butter and some orange jelly. This is my morning meal. I see out of the window: the sky is blue, and a bird is on the tree. I take my bag and go to the station. I get a ticket and take the train. The train is full of persons. I see a friend and say, “Good morning.” We have a talk. I get off at my stop and go to the office. The office is in a high building. I do work with papers and a pen. I make a note of the day's business. At the middle of the day, I take a meal of meat, potato, and soup. In the afternoon, I have more work. When the clock gives five, I go out. I take a walk in the street. The air is fresh. The sun goes down. I go to my house. At night, I have a meal. I see the moon and stars. Then I read a book, get into bed, and go to sleep.
translation: “阳光下的一天”太阳升起来了。我起了床。我脱下睡衣。我用温水和肥皂洗了个澡。我穿上干净的衣服：一件白衬衫、灰裤子、棕色的鞋子。我拿梳子把头发梳顺。然后我走到桌子旁。我拿了一杯牛奶、一个鸡蛋、涂黄油的面包和一些橘子果冻。这是我的早饭。我从窗户看出去：天空是蓝的，树上有一只鸟。我拿起包去车站。我买了张票，上了火车。火车上满是人。我看见一位朋友，说：“早上好。”我们交谈了一会儿。我在我的那一站下了车，去了办公室。办公室在一栋高大的楼房里。我用纸和笔工作。我记下了当天生意的事。中午，我吃了肉、土豆和汤的午饭。下午，我还有更多工作。钟敲五点的时候，我出去了。我在街上散了步。空气很新鲜。太阳落下去了。我回了家。夜里，我吃了饭。我看见月亮和星星。然后我读了一本书，上了床，就睡着了。

title: At the Farm
content: Yesterday I go to a farm in the country. There is a great field of green grass. A man keeps cows, sheep, pigs, and fowls. He has a brown dog and two black cats. I see a horse. The horse is more strong and more tall than the cow. The man gets milk from the cows. The sheep give soft wool. The pigs are fat. I put my hand on a sheep's back. The wool is thick. I take an egg from a fowl. The fowl has feathers of red and yellow. Near the wall there is a spade. The man takes the spade to make a hole in the earth. He puts a seed in the hole. Then he gives water with a bucket. The sun is high and warm. A wind makes the leaves of the trees give a soft sound. I see a plough in the field. The sky has white clouds. It is a beautiful day. I have a feeling of peace. I get a drink of fresh water. Then I go back to the station.
translation: “在农场”昨天我去了乡下的一个农场。那里有一大片绿色的草地。一个男人养着奶牛、绵羊、猪和家禽。他有一条棕色的狗和两只黑色的猫。我看见一匹马。这匹马比奶牛更强壮、更高大。男人从奶牛那里挤牛奶。绵羊提供柔软的羊毛。猪很肥。我把手放在绵羊背上。羊毛很厚。我从一只家禽那里拿了一个蛋。那家禽长着红色和黄色的羽毛。在墙边有一把铲子。男人拿起铲子在地里挖了一个坑。他把一粒种子放进坑里。然后他用桶浇了水。太阳又高又暖和。一阵风吹得树叶发出轻柔的声音。我看见田里有一副犁。天空有白云。这是个美丽的日子。我有一种安宁的感觉。我喝了点清水。然后就回车站了。

title: In the Town
content: Today I go to the town. The town has a wide street. This street is more wide than the road to the farm. On every side there are stores. I go to a market. The market is full of fruit: apples, oranges, berries, and nuts. A woman has a basket of red apples. I say, “What is the price?” She gives the price. I take some money from my pocket and make a payment. I put the apples in my bag. Then I see a store with pictures and books. I go in. There are books of fiction, history, and science. I take a book of verse. The owner is a friend. I give money and get the book. A clock on the wall says twelve. I am hungry, so I go to a place for food. I get a meal of soup, bread, and cheese. I have a drink of milk. After the meal, I go to the station and take a train back. On the train, I see a man with an instrument. He makes beautiful music. I give a smile. He says, “Thank you.”
translation: “在镇上”今天我去了镇上。镇上有一条宽阔的街道。这条街比去农场的路更宽。街道两旁全是店铺。我去了市场。市场里满是水果：苹果、橙子、浆果和坚果。一个女人有一篮子红苹果。我说：“多少钱？”她报了价。我从口袋里掏出些钱付了款。我把苹果放进我的袋子里。接着我看见一家卖画和书的店铺。我走了进去。那里有小说、历史书和科学书。我拿了一本诗集。店主是位朋友。我付了钱，拿了书。墙上的钟显示十二点了。我饿了，于是去了一个吃饭的地方。我吃了一餐汤、面包和奶酪的饭。我喝了杯牛奶。饭后，我去了车站，搭火车回去。在火车上，我看见一个拿着乐器的人。他奏出了美妙的音乐。我朝他笑了笑。他说：“谢谢。”

title: A Day at School
content: I go to school. The school building is more new and more bright than my first school. I go into a room with a board and a table. The person who gives teaching is a kind woman. She has white chalk and makes letters on the board. The boys and girls take pencils and paper and do writing. I make a copy of the words from a book of prose. After that, we have a reading of a story about animals. We see pictures of a monkey, a snake, and a bird. Then we do addition with numbers. She gives a question: “What is the addition of two and three?” I give the answer: “Five.” She says, “That is right.” She puts a map on the wall. The map has blue for sea and green for land. She makes a talk about different countries. I have great interest. When school is over, I go out. I see a ball and give it a kick. I give a jump. Then I go home, happy.
translation: “在学校的一天”我去上学。学校大楼比我第一个学校更新、更明亮。我走进一间有黑板和桌子的房间。上课的是位和蔼的女士。她拿着白粉笔在黑板上写字母。男孩和女孩们拿起铅笔和纸写字。我抄写了一本散文书上的字词。之后，我们读了一个关于动物的故事。我们看了猴子、蛇和鸟的图片。然后我们用数字做加法。她提了个问题：“二加三等于多少？”我给出了答案：“五。”她说：“对的。”她把一张地图挂在墙上。地图上蓝色表示海，绿色表示陆地。她谈了谈不同的国家。我兴趣十足。放学的时候，我走了出去。我看见一个球就踢了一脚。我跳了一下。然后就高高兴兴地回家了。

title: The Sea Journey
content: We make a journey on the sea. We go on a ship with a white sail. The wind is strong. When the wind gets more strong, the waves get more high. The ship goes quickly over the blue water. The sun gives a bright light. I put my hand in the water; it is cold. We see a group of fish under the water. A bird with wide wings goes over the ship. The ship goes to an island. The island has green trees and a mountain. We get off the ship on a small boat. At the harbour, there are boats. We take a walk. The sand is soft and yellow. We go up the mountain. From the top, we see the sea all round. The direction to the north is clear. I take a picture with my camera. When the sun goes down, the sky is red and orange. We go back to the ship. At night, we see the moon and stars. The ship's light is on. We have a meal of fish and rice. I am full of happiness.
translation: “海上旅行”我们在海上做了一次旅行。我们乘着一艘挂着白帆的船。风很大。风变得更强时，海浪也变得更高。船在蓝色的水面上快速行驶。太阳发出明亮的光。我把手伸进水里；水很凉。我们看到水下有一群鱼。一只翅膀宽阔的鸟从船上方飞过。船驶向一个岛屿。岛上有绿色的树和一座山。我们换乘一艘小船下了大船。港湾里有很多小船。我们散了会儿步。沙子又软又黄。我们上了山。从山顶上，我们能看到四周的海。向北的方向很清楚。我用相机拍了张照片。太阳下山时，天空红橙相间。我们回到船上。夜里，我们看见了月亮和星星。船上的灯亮了。我们吃了鱼和米饭。我满心都是幸福。

title: Making a Meal
content: I make a meal. I get meat, potatoes, and an apple. I put water in a pot and put it on the fire. The water gets boiling. I put the potatoes in. I take a knife and make cuts in the meat. I put salt on the meat. Then I put the meat in the oven. The oven is hot. I make a soup with a bone and some roots. I put the roots and some rice in another pot. I get butter and bread ready. I put plates, spoons, forks, and knives on the table. I take a sweet cake from the store. I get cheese and make it into small bits. The smell of the cooking is good. My friend comes. I say, “The meal is ready.” We have a good meal. This meal is more good than a meal at the store. We have a drink of wine. After, we have fruit and a jelly. I give my friend a kiss on the face. We are happy.
translation: “做饭”我做了一顿饭。我拿来了肉、土豆和一个苹果。我把水放进锅里，放在火上。水烧开了。我把土豆放进去。我拿刀在肉上切了几下。我把盐撒在肉上。然后把肉放进烤箱。烤箱很热。我用一根骨头和一些根茎做了汤。我把根茎和一些米放进另一只锅里。我把黄油和面包准备好。我把盘子、勺子、叉子和刀子摆在桌子上。我从储物柜里拿出一块甜蛋糕。我拿来奶酪，把它弄成小块。做饭的气味很香。我的朋友来了。我说：“饭好了。”我们美美地吃了一顿饭。这顿饭比店里做的更好吃。我们喝了点葡萄酒。之后，我们吃了水果和果冻。我在朋友脸上亲了一下。我们很开心。

title: At the Hospital
content: My brother has a bad fall from a horse. He gets a wound on his arm and a broken bone. We take him to the hospital in a carriage. At the hospital, a medical man comes and gives attention. He sees the wound and the blood. He puts a clean cloth on it. Then he takes an instrument and makes a support for the bone. My brother is in great pain, but he keeps quiet. The medical man says, “You will get well, but you must keep the arm still and take rest.” We give thanks. In the room, there are beds with white linen. The smell of medical soap is in the air. My brother gets a drink of water and has a feeling of comfort. After some days, he is more healthy. He can make a move with his fingers. We are all happy.
translation: “在医院”我弟弟从马上摔下来，伤得很重。他手臂上受了伤，骨头也断了。我们用马车把他送到医院。在医院里，一位医生过来了，很细心地察看了他。他查看了伤口和血。他在伤口上放了一块干净的布。然后他拿了一个器械，给骨头做了个固定。我弟弟疼得厉害，但他一直安静地待着。医生说：“你会好起来的，但你必须保持手臂不动，还要休息。”我们向他道了谢。房间里摆放着铺有白色亚麻床单的床。空气中有医用肥皂的味道。我弟弟喝了点水，感觉舒服了一些。几天之后，他身体更好了。他能够动一动手指了。我们都很高兴。

title: The Storm
content: Yesterday at night, a great storm came. The sky got dark. The wind was strong and made a loud noise through the trees. I was in the house with my family. The rain came down in great drops. The sound on the roof was like a hammer. Then we saw a sudden electric light in the sky. It was bright and white. After that, the thunder gave a deep, loud sound - more loud than the wind. The house gave a shake. My little sister had fear and gave a cry. My mother said, “Do not be in fear. The house is safe.” We put a curtain over the window. The rain kept on for an hour. Then the wind went down. The clouds went away, and the moon came out. In the morning, the air was clean, the streets were wet, and some branches were on the ground. The storm was a great show of nature's power.
translation: “暴风雨”昨晚夜里，来了一场大暴风雨。天空变暗了。风很大，呼啸着穿过树林。我和家人在房子里。大雨点落了下来。雨水打在屋顶上，声音像锤子一样。接着我们看到天空中突然出现一道电光。那光又亮又白。然后，雷声深沉而响亮——比风声更响。房子颤动了一下。我的小妹妹害怕了，哭喊起来。母亲说：“别害怕。房子很安全。”我们把帘子拉上遮住窗户。雨持续下了一个小时。接着风势减弱了。云散了，月亮出来了。到了早上，空气很干净，街道是湿的，地上有些树枝。这场暴风雨真是大自然威力的一次展示。

title: At the Market
content: Today I go to the market with a great basket. First, I get food: bread, butter, milk, cheese, eggs, meat, fish, and rice. I put some salt and sugar in a small bag. Then I get fruit: red apples, yellow oranges, and sweet berries. I see nuts and potatoes and put them in. The basket gets more full and more heavy. Then I go to a place for cloth. I get a bit of cotton, silk, and wool. I see leather boots and shoes. I get a leather button. At the metal place, I get tin boxes, a copper wire, an iron nail, a brass key, a steel knife, and a silver spoon. A person has glass bottles and a glass cup. I get the cup. Then I get a comb, a brush, a sponge, and some soap. I also take a ball of cord and a pair of scissors. My basket is very full and heavy. I give money for all. The payment is great, but the quality is good. I go back, happy with my new things.
translation: “在市场”今天，我带着一个大篮子去了市场。首先，我买了食物：面包、黄油、牛奶、奶酪、鸡蛋、肉、鱼和米。我把一些盐和糖放进一个小袋子里。然后我买水果：红苹果、黄橙子和甜浆果。我看到坚果和土豆，也把它们放了进去。篮子越来越满、越来越重。接着我去了卖布料的地方。我买了一点棉布、丝绸和羊毛。我看到皮靴和皮鞋。我买了一粒皮纽扣。在卖金属的地方，我买了锡盒、一根铜丝、一根铁钉、一把黄铜钥匙、一把钢刀和一把银匙。有个人有玻璃瓶和一只玻璃杯。我买下了那只杯子。然后我拿了一把梳子、一把刷子、一块海绵和一些肥皂。我还拿了一团线和一把剪刀。我的篮子非常满、非常重。我为所有这些付了钱。付的钱很多，但东西质量是好的。我高高兴兴地带着我的新东西回去了。

title: The Library
content: I have a love for books. I go to the library. It is a quiet building with many shelves. I see books of history, science, fiction, and verse. I take a book of stories from the shelf. The book has a red cover with gold letters. I open it and see the print. The story is about a man on a long journey. He has a strong belief in peace. He goes over mountains and through rivers. He is not in fear of danger. He gives help to all. The story is full of beautiful prose. This story is more beautiful than the one before. I have a feeling of pleasure as I do the reading. It gives a new idea to my mind. Knowledge is a great thing. I make a note in my memory. A man says, “We will make the library shut now.” So I put the book back. I go out with the thought of the story in my head. I say, “I will come again tomorrow.”
translation: “图书馆”我热爱书籍。我去了图书馆。那是一座安静的建筑，有许多书架。我看到了历史、科学、小说和诗歌方面的书。我从书架上拿了一本故事书。那本书有着红色的封面和金色的字母。我打开它，看到了印刷文字。故事讲的是一个男人做长途旅行的事。他对和平有着坚定的信念。他越过高山，穿过河流。他不害怕危险。他帮助所有的人。故事里满是优美的散文。这个故事比之前那个更美。我在阅读时感到一种快乐。它给了我的心灵一个新的想法。知识是伟大的东西。我把它记在了记忆里。一个人说：“我们现在要把图书馆关上了。”于是我把书放了回去。我走了出去，脑子里还想着那个故事。我说：“明天我还会再来。”
